description: Multi-image concept mapping. Each concept maps to a list of image paths. Vision embeddings should be averaged across all images per concept.

sources.imagenet: ILSVRC/imagenet-1k validation split via HuggingFace datasets

cat.description: tabby, tiger cat, Persian cat, Siamese cat, Egyptian cat

dog.description: golden retriever, labrador, german shepherd, great dane, samoyed, beagle, rottweiler, dalmatian, corgi, pug

bird.description: robin, jay, peacock, macaw, lorikeet, hummingbird, toucan, flamingo, pelican, king penguin

fish.description: tench, goldfish, coho salmon, rock beauty, anemone fish, sturgeon, gar, lionfish, puffer

car.description: ambulance, station wagon, taxi, convertible, jeep, limo, minivan, pickup, racer, sports car
